description:
Add 'Pacific Gas and Electric Company' (PG&E) as a new Utility resource in CAMEO Data Manager with the following details:

- Name: Pacific Gas and Electric Company
- Type: Electric & Gas Utility
- ID/Alias: PG&E
- Address: 77 Beale Street, San Francisco, CA 94105
- Phone: 1-800-743-5000
- Emergency Phone (24-Hour): 1-800-743-5002
- Contact Person: Maria Gonzalez
- Title: Emergency Coordination Manager
- Notes: 'Covers electric and natural gas service for Jefferson County. Can dispatch field crews for emergency gas shutoff within 30 minutes. Coordinates with county EOC on Channel 7.'
